# CWE-653: Improper Isolation or Compartmentalization
lang: go
file: CWE-653-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

type AuditLog struct {
	ID      uint
	Message string
}

// Vulnerable: public and admin routes share the same superuser database handle.
var sharedDB *gorm.DB

func PublicSearch(c *gin.Context) {
	q := c.Query("q")
	var logs []AuditLog
	sharedDB.Raw("SELECT id, message FROM audit_logs WHERE message LIKE ?", "%"+q+"%").Scan(&logs)
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, logs)
}

func AdminPurge(c *gin.Context) {
	sharedDB.Exec("DELETE FROM audit_logs")
	c.Status(http.StatusOK)
}
